---
title: "Alleahrose Jaroma"
subtitle: "Finance Major"
# `IMG_9544 2.jpeg` Me volunteering at VOCAL.
image: IMG_9544 2.jpeg
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/ajaroma2016-arch
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alleahrose-jaroma-44043230b

---

A little bit about me and my life. I have lived in five different states, Rhode Island, Georgia, South Carolina, Tennessee, and Florida. I love to travel and read books. I volunteer at VOCAL Voices of Change Animal League. 

## Education

University of South Florida, St. Petersburg \| FL \| August 2023 - present
